artifact.title: Mina's World
artifact.subtitle: A safe kawaii sandbox where kids design cute avatars, build tiny worlds, and visit friends.
artifact.audience: Kids age 8-12 and parents who want visible safety controls

screens.label: Onboarding
screens.description: Choose a starter style, create a kid-safe profile, and enter Mina's first world.

screens.label: Avatar Creator
screens.description: Customize cute hair, eyes, outfit, and accessories with parent-safe presets.

screens.label: World Builder
screens.description: Place houses, parks, shops, and decorations in a friendly drag-and-drop builder.

screens.label: Friend Visit
screens.description: Visit approved friends, use canned chat, and explore together with guardian limits.

screens.label: Quest Map
screens.description: Follow daily creative quests and learning mini-games without pressure loops.
